<!--
Before merging, apply one of the labels below so your change lands in the
right section of the auto-generated release notes (see .github/release.yml):

  - enhancement   — New features and other improvements
  - bug           — Fixed bugs
  - ci            — CI and tooling
  - dependencies  — Updated dependencies (dependabot self-applies)
  - documentation — Improved documentation

Unlabeled PRs will land under "Other Changes" in the release body.
-->
